commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a4f73b2f46d5940daabec474e1e2fa7ade340c92)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an opt-in Feishu append-only streaming payload mode while retaining full-content updates by default, documents and tests the mode, and isolates three tooling tests from runner-provided environment variables.

PR surface: Source +44, Tests +85, Docs +2. Total +131 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at the source-contract level: append mode sends suffixes to an endpoint documented to receive full accumulated text, matching the previously reported truncation path. There is no exact-head live Feishu reproduction proving safe rendering or the latency improvement.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers should reject or redesign the tenant-dependent payload mode and decide whether a bounded full-content coalescing change belongs in this branch or a replacement PR.

target.title: fix(feishu): add append streaming content mode
target.author: feie22

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
